name: leadbox-qa-integration
description: LeadBox QA Integration 2.0.1 workflow hotfix mapped to LeadBox CRM 9.9.1.12-rc2: Node.js 22, npm install without lockfile cache dependency, manual workflow execution, staging evidence and governed visual baselines.

scripts.qa:foundation-check: npm run qa:validate && npm run qa:sample && npm run qa:dashboard && npm run qa:analyze
scripts.qa:1.3: npm run qa:validate && npm run qa:contract && npm run qa:tenant && npm run qa:media:lifecycle && npm run qa:dashboard && npm run qa:analyze
scripts.qa:1.4: npm run qa:validate && npm run qa:visual && npm run qa:visual:gate
scripts.qa:mapped: npm run qa:validate && npm run qa:setup && npm run qa:smoke && npm run qa:media && npm run qa:visual:gate
scripts.qa:integration:2.0: npm run qa:validate && npm run qa:staging:readiness && npm run qa:setup && npm run qa:auth:evidence && npm run qa:media:diagnose && npm run qa:baseline:capture && npm run qa:evidence:index && npm run qa:visual:gate
